scripts.db:dev:start: pnpm dotenvx run -f ../env/.env -- sh -c 'docker compose -p "${DB_DEV_PROJECT_NAME:-$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)")-db-dev}" -f docker-compose.dev.yaml up -d'
scripts.db:dev:stop: pnpm dotenvx run -f ../env/.env -- sh -c 'docker compose -p "${DB_DEV_PROJECT_NAME:-$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)")-db-dev}" -f docker-compose.dev.yaml stop'
